channel.title: Pipeline on Xhuljano
channel.description: Recent content in Pipeline on Xhuljano

item.title: I Built a Cross-MCP Pipeline Pattern — One Server Feeds Another
item.description: The cross-MCP pipeline pattern: one MCP server scans, a bridge script parses results, and GitHub gets structured issues automatically. This pattern works for Sentinel->Issues, Screener->Trades, Firecrawl->Wiki, and more.
